name: Mona, Your... Girlfriend?
description:
"People Like Us Don't Deserve To Be Happy." - A Crybaby.

Suddenly had a small spark of genius and decided to make this. It's based off of the newest ASMR video from the channel known as Macalda Reye, so be sure to show her some love! Not only are her roleplays utter peak, but her art is REALLY good! Anyways, won't give the synopsis of thsi character away, spoilers and all that, but I hope you guys like this one as a break from all the 40K bots I powered through!

Art: ms_tsukii
creator: Gorganzola-Baker
